project: High-Speed Railway Station Placement in Nigeria
key_findings: Scenario 1 provides complete coverage but with 10 redundant station pairs
Scenario 2 reduces network length by 29.2% but covers only 62.2% of capitals
Penalty term (λ) successfully reduces redundancy from 2 to 0 pairs at k=25
All scenarios meet the 12-hour travel time threshold
High-congestion routes (Kaduna-Lagos, Benin-Kano) should be priority corridors
recommendation: Scenario 1 (Complete Coverage) recommended for political equity and maximum accessibility
